original_statement: how long is the publication the far reaching effects of broadband?
mutated_statement: how long is the content the far reaching effects of something?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Specificity reduction/generalization: noun "publication" generalized to broader "content" (publication → content) | domain-specific term "broadband" replaced by vague placeholder "something" (broadband → something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的 judge_thought 中可以看到关键句：“The question refers to the book titled 'the far reaching effects of broadband.' In the table (row 6), this title has 415 pages, indicating its length.”（以及 iterations 中的 thought 重复说明）。Agent 直接将变异问题等同于原始标题并在表中查得第6行的页面数415，给出具体答案且没有任何表示不确定、模糊或要求澄清的语句。基于以上表现——直接按自己的理解处理问题、未指出“content”与“publication”或“something”带来的广义/不明确性、也未请求更多信息——符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义，因此归类为该类别。
